name: 5 Star Car Title Loans
description_short: Oklahoma City's 5 Star Car Title Loans at 4224 NW 39th St offers quick same-day title loan approvals.
description_long:
5 Star Car Title Loans is located at 4224 NW 39th St in Oklahoma City, OK, serving the northwest part of the city. This standalone location is open Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM, and Saturday from 10AM to 5PM, making it convenient for Oklahoma City residents who need quick access to title loan services. The location is situated in an accessible area with ample parking for customers.

This Oklahoma City branch specializes in title loans—a way to borrow money using your vehicle as collateral while you retain its use. The team at this location can guide you through the application process quickly, often providing same-day funding. For specific questions about loan amounts, terms, or to start your application, call 405-867-6288 directly.

If you're an Oklahoma City resident facing an urgent financial need, bring your car title, valid ID, proof of income, and proof of residency. The streamlined process here means you could walk out with funds the same day. 5 Star Car Title Loans is designed to provide quick financial relief when you need it most.
pros: Borrower keeps and drives the vehicle throughout the loan term
Same-day funding available for approved applicants
No prepayment penalties — pay off early at no extra cost
Accepts poor or imperfect credit; underwriting based on vehicle equity
255,000+ loans funded since 2012 — established track record
Licensed and regulated lender with disclosed state-by-state availability
Accepts cars, motorcycles, and semi-trucks as collateral
cons: Interest rates and APR are not disclosed on the homepage — borrowers must apply to see terms
Default risk: vehicle can be repossessed if loan is not repaid
Only 11 public reviews — very limited independent social proof for a 14-year-old lender
Available in approximately 18 states only — not a true national lender
Title loans are a high-cost borrowing product; not suitable for borrowers who can qualify for lower-rate alternatives
best_for: Car or motorcycle owners with poor credit who need fast cash and have vehicle equity
Borrowers facing urgent expenses (rent, bills, car repairs) who need same-day funding
People who need more than a payday loan ($1K–$50K range) but cannot qualify for an unsecured personal loan
Truck owners or self-employed drivers needing a larger secured loan against a commercial vehicle
diagnosis: Best suited for vehicle owners with limited credit options who need fast access to $500–$50,000 and have sufficient equity in their car, motorcycle, or truck. The main caveat is that title loans are an expensive, last-resort product — APRs are not disclosed publicly and the vehicle serves as collateral, meaning default results in repossession.
services: Installment loans (fixed payments, up to 24 months)
meta_description: 5 Star Car Title Loans at 4224 NW 39th St, Oklahoma City, OK. Quick title loans with same-day funding.
seo_title: 5 Star Car Title Loans in Oklahoma City, OK | CreditDoc
